props.desc: 7HZ and their audio engineers are collaborating yet again, with the founder of In-Ear Fidelity and YouTuber, Crinacle. The 7HZ x Crinacle Zero:2 is an improved 10mm dynamic driver IEM with enhanced bass and midrange. It also comes with a better stock cable, thus offering a great audio experience at an affordable price.
props.subtitle: Just released
props.text: 7HZ Saltnotes Zero:2 coming soon with new 10mm Dynamic Driver For Tonal Excellence
props.title: 7Hertz Saltnotes Zero:2
